mapper.select: select * from jst_order_main where order_no = #{orderNo} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select om.order_id, om.order_no, om.user_id, om.contest_id, c.contest_name, om.participant_id, p.name as participant_name, om.channel_id, ch.channel_name, om.partner_id, om.list_amount, om.coupon_amount, om.points_deduct_amount, om.points_used, om.net_pay_amount, om.service_fee, om.coupon_id, om.order_type, om.pay_method, om.order_status, om.refund_status, om.pay_time, om.aftersale_deadline, om.create_time, (select oi.item_name from jst_order_item oi where oi.order_id = om.order_id and oi.del_flag = '0' order by oi.item_id asc limit 1) as item_name, (select oi.rebate_share from jst_order_item oi where oi.order_id = om.order_id and oi.del_flag = '0' order by oi.item_id asc limit 1) as rebate_share, (select pr.payment_no from jst_payment_record pr where pr.order_id = om.order_id and pr.del_flag = '0' order by pr.payment_id desc limit 1) as payment_no, (select pr.third_party_no from jst_payment_record pr where pr.order_id = om.order_id and pr.del_flag = '0' order by pr.payment_id desc limit 1) as third_party_no from jst_order_main om left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = om.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = om.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_channel ch on ch.channel_id = om.channel_id and ch.del_flag = '0' where om.order_id = #{orderId} and om.del_flag = '0' limit 1
